motion: PR #31 (epic: First-Run Setup Wizard) — after applying all prior council fixes (four councils total), the implementation is correct, complete, and secure and ready to merge into main

fixes.description: F1: setupTestConnection uses raw fetch without AbortController — primary wizard action freezes for ~75-120s on unreachable SSH hosts. Add AbortController with 60s timeout, following the apiFetch pattern at lines 36-48.
citations: frontend/src/lib/api.ts L:133-148 (setupTestConnection — raw fetch, no timeout)
frontend/src/lib/api.ts L:36-48 (apiFetch — AbortController pattern to follow)

fixes.description: F2: setupSaveConfig uses raw fetch without AbortController — same timeout omission as F1. save_config also tests the connection before saving, so the same unreachable-host scenario applies. Add AbortController with 60s timeout.
citations: frontend/src/lib/api.ts L:150-161 (setupSaveConfig — raw fetch, no timeout)
frontend/src/lib/api.ts L:36-48 (apiFetch — AbortController pattern to follow)

non_blocking.description: Add 'ssh_config' to error_source union type in frontend types
Address Drop no-op clippy warning — add #[allow(dead_code)] or remove custom Drop impl

pr_amendments: Note that setup API functions now use a 60-second timeout (longer than the 30s default to accommodate SSH tunnel negotiation)
